title: The Aligarh Muslim University Act, 1920
full_text: The Aligarh Muslim University Act, 1920 अलीगढ़ मुस्‍लिम विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1920 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 192040 Act Number: 40 Enactment Date: 1920-09-14 Act Year: 1920 Short Title: The Aligarh Muslim University Act, 1920 Hindi Title: अलीगढ़ मुस्‍लिम विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1920 Long Title: An Act to incorporate a teaching and residential Muslim University at Aligarh. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 01-12-1920 Last Updated: 01-04-2019 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definit ions. Section 3. Incorporation. Section 4. Dissolution of the Muhammadan Anglo-Oriental College, Aligarh, and the Muslim UniversityAssociation, and transfer of all property to the University. Section 5. Powers of the University. Section 6. Recognition of degrees. Section 7. Reserve funds. Section 8. University open to all persons. Section 9. [Omitted.]. Section 10. Residence of students. Section 11. Teaching in the University. Section 12. Power to establish and maintain high schools and other institutions. Section 12A. [Omitted.]. Section 13. The Visitor. Section 14. [Omitted.]. Section 15. Chief Rector. Section 16. Section 20B. The Registrar. Section 20C. The Finance Officer. Section 21. Powers of other officers. Section 22. Authorities of the University. Section 23. The Court. Section 24. The Executive Council. Section 25. The Academic Council. Section 26. Other authorities of the University. Section 26A. Disqualifications for membership. Section 27. Power to make Statutes. Section 28. Statutes. Show Related Subordinates Section 29. Power to make Ordinances. Show Related Subordinates Section 31. Regulations. Section 32. [Omitted.]. Section 33. Examinations. Section 34. Annual report. Section 35. Annual accounts. Section 36. Conditions of service of employee. Section 36A. Procedure of appeal and arbitration in disciplinary cases against students. Section 36B. Right to appeal. Section 37. Provident and pension funds. Section 38. Filling of casual vacancies. Section 39. Proceedings of University authorities not invalidated by vacancies. Section 40.
